title: Photo Restoration
brief: Digitize 1910's postcard photo's front and back. Approx 24 photos. These postcards were taken back in 1910 of a famed magician and his traveling company in Asia and abroad. They company included my Grandmother and Aunt, they both described the picture, on the back side of the post card photo. I would like to have the front as one picture and the back side as another . The picture (some) are dark and would like for them to be lightened and clear. The writing on the back of each photo needs to be clear and legible. I need the finish work to be electronicall capabile to be copied, pasted in a book, and social media - the book will be created after this project is completed. A couple of examples are attached.
